subject: PAPPA
evidence_text: As show in, a selective PI3K inhibitor, LY294002, abated down-regulations of LXRalpha, ABCA1, ABCG1 and SR-BI mRNAs and proteins by PAPP-A in THP-1 macrophage derived foam cells, while an inhibitor of the MAPK cascade, Raf1 kinase inhibitor I, did not have this effect (A and B), indicating that the down-regulation expression of LXRalpha, ABCA1, ABCG1 and SR-BI by PAPP-A involves the PI3-K and Akt pathway only.

subject: TNFRSF14
evidence_text: TNF receptor-associated factors activate several distal signalling molecules, including canonical and non-canonical nuclear factor-κB, c-Jun N-terminal kinase, p38 mitogen-activated protein kinase , activator protein 1 , extracellular signal-regulated kinase and nuclear factor of activated T cells, but how each specific TNF receptor-associated factor adaptor links tumour necrosis factor receptor superfamily receptor functions with downstream pathways remains unclear ( ). 4-1BB can bind TRAF1, TRAF2 and TRAF3 (the latter only in humans), OX40 and CD27 can bind TRAF2, TRAF3 and TRAF5, and HVEM and CD30 can bind TRAF1, TRAF2, TRAF3 and TRAF5, whereas GITR recruits only TRAF2 (REFS - ) ( ).

subject: HSPB1

subject: Histone
evidence_text: JDP2, a repressor of AP-1, recruits a histone deacetylase 3 complex to inhibit the retinoic acid-induced differentiation of F9 cells.

subject: NKX2-5
evidence_text: Similar to Nkx2-5, MEF2C expression initiated cardiomyogenesis, resulting in the up-regulation of Brachyury T, bone morphogenetic protein-4, Nkx2-5, GATA-4, cardiac alpha-actin, and myosin heavy chain expression.

subject: STAT3
evidence_text: Following tyrosine phosphorylation, STAT3 proteins dimerize, translocate to the nucleus, and activate specific target genes involved in cell-cycle progression.
